venue.title: The Venue
venue.transport: Red metro line — Oriente Station. Buses 728 and 759.
venue.parking: Vasco da Gama car park (5 min walk).
venue.access: Fully accessible venue. Reserved areas for reduced mobility.
venue.addr: Av. Cidade de Lourenço Marques · Olivais · Lisbon
venue.drag: Drag to rotate · Scroll to zoom
venue.entrances: <bold>Two entrances available</bold> — you can enter from the left side or the right side of the venue. Both give full access to the space.
venue.access_car_body: A2/IC17 (CRIL) or Av. Infante D. Henrique towards Oriente. Exit at Av. de Berlim or Av. Cidade de Lourenço Marques, Olivais Sul.
venue.access_metro_body: Red Line, Olivais station (1 min walk).
venue.access_bus_body: Carris lines 731, 744, 750, 759 and 781 with a stop next to the park.
venue.access_parking_body: Street parking on surrounding roads: Av. de Berlim and Rua Cidade de Nova Lisboa.

notFound.heading: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.

error.heading: Something went wrong
